zh.Morpeth, Northumberland, England: 英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯
zh.Dunbar Castle, Scotland: 蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴
zh.Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberlan: 英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比
zh.lifeSummary: 當Juliana de Dunbar於大約1120年出生在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴時，她的父親Gospatric II59歲，母親Sybil Morel51歲。她和Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth至少有4個兒子。她去世於1201年在英國諾圖波藍德享年82歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Juliana de Dunbar于大约1120年出生在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾鄧巴鄧巴时，她的父亲Gospatric II59岁，母亲Sybil Morel51岁。她和Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth至少有4个儿子。她去世于1201年在英国諾圖波藍德享年82岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德莫普斯紐明斯特 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Juliana
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Julianus ( see Julian ), which was revived in England in the 18th century and has been used occasionally ever since.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Juliana de Dunbar was born about 1120, in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, her father, Gospatric II, was 59 and her mother, Sybil Morel, was 51. She had at least 4 sons with Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth. She died in 1201, in Northumberland, England, at the age of 82, and was buried in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Juliana de Dunbar est née environ 1120, à Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Écosse, son père, Gospatric II, avait 59 ans et sa mère, Sybil Morel, avait 51 ans. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils avec Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth. Elle est décédée en 1201, à Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterrée à Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Juliana de Dunbar um 1120 in Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gospatric II 59 und ihre Mutter Sybil Morel 51. Sie hatte mit Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth mindestens 4 Söhne. Sie starb 1201 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Northumberland, England und wurde in Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Dunbar è nata il circa 1120 nel Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, sua padre, Gospatric II, aveva 59 anni e sua madre, Sybil Morel, aveva 51 anni. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli con Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth. Morì nel 1201, nel Northumberland, England, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolta a Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, England.

ja.Morpeth, Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペス
ja.Dunbar Castle, Scotland: スコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバー
ja.Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberlan: イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビー
ja.Northallerton, Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイアノーサラートン
ja.Northumberland, England: イギリスノースウンバーランド
ja.lifeSummary: Juliana de Dunbarが約1120年にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアダンバーダンバーで生まれた時，父Gospatric IIは59歳，母Sybil Morelは51歳であった。彼女はRanulph Merlay Lord of Morpethとの間に少なくとも4人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1201年にイギリスノースウンバーランドで82歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドモーペスニューミンスター アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Juliana de Dunbar(이)가 대략 1120년 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 던바 던바에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gospatric II(은)는 59세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil Morel(은)는 51세였다. 그녀는 Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1201년 영국 노르스벌랜드에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 모르페스 뉴민스터 애브브이에 묻혔다.

mn.Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberlan: Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Norðhymbra land, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Juliana de Dunbar nasceu aproximadamente 1120, em Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, seu pai, Gospatric II, tinha 59 anos e sua mãe, Sybil Morel, tinha 51 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos com Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth. Ela faleceu em 1201, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 82 anos, e foi sepultada em Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Juliana de Dunbar родилась около 1120 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Gospatric II было 59 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil Morel, 51. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына от Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth. Она умерла в 1201 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 82 лет и была похоронена в местности нюминстир эбби, морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Juliana de Dunbar nació aproximadamente 1120, en Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotland, su papá, Gospatric II, tenía 59 años y su mamá, Sybil Morel, tenía 51 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos con Ranulph Merlay Lord of Morpeth. Murió en 1201, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultada en Newminster Abbey, Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
